title: Japanese Shrimp Noodle Dish
description: A light and crispy Japanese dish featuring shrimp, chopped tomatoes, and a char-grill flavor, all combined with buttery noodles.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the chopped garlic.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and cook until they are pink and fully cooked.
Add the chopped tomatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and sesame oil.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the shrimp and tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the shrimp and tomato mixture.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped green onions.
